basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) has released the official Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 notification for 1 vacancy. The recruitment has been announced for eligible candidates with MBBS and MD degree in Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology. Interested candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria as per PGI Rules can attend the walk-in interview on 21 July 2026. The official notification details and application process are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Age Limit: As per PGI Rules

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS & MD degree in Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology
qualification.details: A medical qualification included on the first of second schedule of Part II of their schedule of the Indian MEDICAL Council Act of 1956 The candidate must be registered with the State/Central Medical Council. A postgraduate qualification e.g. M.D. (Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology) from a recognized Indian University. Only Indian National Candidates are allowed to apply.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Senior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.postgraduate_institute_of_medical_educat: MBBS & MD degree in Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PGIMER Senior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Resident Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: A medical qualification included on the first of second schedule of Part II of their schedule of the Indian MEDICAL Council Act of 1956 The candidate must be registered with the State/Central Medical Council. A postgraduate qualification e.g. M.D. (Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology) from a recognized Indian University. Only Indian National Candidates are allowed to apply.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Resident Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Resident Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Age Limit: As per PGI Rules

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on 21st July 2026 with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree and an MD degree in Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology from a recognized Indian University and be registered with the State/Central Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Resident post in the Department of Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Resident position will be as per PGIMER rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Resident post is as per PGIMER rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for the Senior Resident post going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the PGIMER office in Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original certificates/testimonials, 2 sets of Bio-data (CV), photocopies of Matriculation certificate, 12th certificate, MBBS & MD degree, and a copy of Aadhar as ID proof.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or temporary job?
faq.answer: This is a temporary job position.

faq.question: Q10. Who can apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Only Indian Nationals who fulfill the educational and registration criteria are eligible to apply.
